primary_source: Whittaker, 1903. On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics. Math. Annalen 57:333-355. DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.
title: QA Whittaker Rational Direction S^1 FAIL [266] - non-coprime seed claimed in D_m
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: declares (b,e)=(2,4) as a claimed extra seed of D_9. gcd(2,4)=2, not 1, so this seed must be rejected from D_m by the validator. The cert spec is explicit that gcd(b,e)=1 is enforced for every seed; non-coprime seeds give non-primitive Pythagorean triples that, while still defining valid rational directions on S^1, fall outside the QA-rational direction net definition. Validator must produce a WRD_HARD error.
source_attribution: (Whittaker, 1903) On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics, Math. Annalen 57:333-355, DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.

witnesses.name: noncoprime_seed_(2,4)
witnesses._note: claimed_extra_seeds includes (2,4) which has gcd=2; validator must reject this with WRD_HARD

fail_ledger.rationale: Seed (2,4) has gcd(2,4)=2 != 1; cert v1 enforces gcd-coprime seeds only. Validator's claimed_extra_seeds check produces a WRD_HARD failure for this entry.
